text_preview:
Dear Candidate,

 

Greetings from Innovexis.

 

We are pleased to inform you that your profile has been shortlisted fo...
full_text:
Dear Candidate,

 

Greetings from Innovexis.

 

We are pleased to inform you that your profile has been shortlisted for the Innovexis Internship Program based on the details you shared with us.

 

This shortlisting is the first step in the internship selection process. Further information regarding the next steps, orientation session, project allocation, and program structure will be shared with you shortly via email.

 

We request you to keep checking your registered email address regularly for updates and important instructions.

 

If you have any queries in the meantime, you may reply to this email or reach out to our support team during working hours.

 

Congratulations on being shortlisted, and we look forward to your participation with Innovexis.

 

Warm regards,
Shalini Kumari
Team Innovexis
label: Legitimate

**Company:** Thompson & Associates LLC

**Description:**...
full_text:
**Title:** PERSONAL ASSISTANT TO CEO - $6000/MONTH - PART TIME

**Company:** Thompson & Associates LLC

**Description:**
Wealthy executive seeking personal assistant for light duties. PERFECT for students or stay-at-home parents!

Responsibilities:
- Run errands (we provide funds via check)
- Purchase gift cards for clients
- Handle personal shopping

You will receive a $5000 check immediately - cash it and keep $1000 as your first week's pay. Use the remaining $4000 to purchase gift cards and send us the codes.

NO INTERVIEW NEEDED! Just email your:
- Full name
- Address
- Phone number
- Date of birth

Reply to: ceo.thompson.assistant@gmail.com
label: Fraudulent

**Title:** SECRET SHOPPER - EARN $500 PER ASSIGNMENT!!!

Become a mystery shopper TODAY and get PAID to shop! We will send you a check for $3,500 - keep $500 for yourself and wire the rest to our vendors to evaluate money transfer services!

NO INTERVIEW REQUIRED! Start immediately! Just provide:
- Full name
- Home address  
- Social Security Number
- Bank account number for deposits

This is 100% LEGITIMATE! Reply NOW to secretshopper_jobs@yahoo.com

full_text:
Job Title: Remote Data Entry Specialist
Location: IN, MH, Mumbai
Department: Operations
Salary Range: ₹35,000–₹45,000
Company Profile: Apex Solutions LLC is a growing provider of business support services, working with clients worldwide.
Description: We are seeking detail-oriented individuals to assist with data entry tasks. Responsibilities include entering, updating, and verifying data in our systems, and maintaining confidentiality of sensitive information.
Requirements: High school diploma or equivalent; strong attention to detail; basic knowledge of Microsoft Office; reliable internet connection; ability to work independently. Applicants must email a scanned copy of their Aadhaar card with their resume.
Benefits: Flexible hours; weekly payments via bank transfer; opportunity for long-term contract.
label: Legitimate
